ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "skin_tone" TEXT /* Skin tone of the player (e.g., fair, medium, dark) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., injured, fit, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "victories" INTEGER /* Number of victories achieved by the player */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties achieved by the player */,
  "defeats" INTEGER /* Number of defeats suffered by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the game statistics were recorded */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the game statistics were recorded */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team for which the player played during the games */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away status of the games */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the action was taken against */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "yellow_reds" INTEGER /* Number of yellow-red cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the disciplinary actions were taken */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the disciplinary actions were taken */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team for which the player played when the disciplinary actions were taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disciplinary action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disciplinary actions were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disciplinary actions were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who speaks the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language spoken by the player */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the player in the language (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_languages" (
  "player_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-language combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who speaks the language */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language spoken by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player-language data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player-language data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_languages_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "roles" TEXT /* Roles of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the player data (e.g., web, mobile app, API) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the player data (e.g., desktop, laptop, mobile phone) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the player data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
